title: erianthus strictus
intro: Erianthus strictus, also known as Sessile Button Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erianthus strictus include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as congestion and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Erianthus strictus can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
